summary: Comprehensive testing of Info-Secretary Korean app completed. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI working with minor feed generation issue.

integration_issues.flow: Feed refresh with web scraping + AI
integration_issues.issue: Feed refresh returns no articles despite having interests and enabled sources. Web scraping or AI classification may not be working properly with Korean keywords (BTS, 아이유).

passed_tests: All 19 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Sources management (3 sources: Naver News, Google News, DART)
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate feed refresh functionality - web scraping from Naver/Google News or AI classification with GPT-5.2 may not be working properly with Korean keywords. Despite having interests (BTS, 아이유) and enabled sources, feed refresh returns 0 articles.
